title: trema timorense
intro: Trema timorense, also known as the East Timor trema or the Timorese nettle tree, is a species of plant in the family Cannabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Trema timorense include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or poultice, and it is also used in herbal teas and topical creams.
